name: Tofu & Lemon Grass Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 stalk Lemon grass, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a stockpot, combine water, kaffir lime leaves, soy sauce, white pepper, lemon juice, brown sugar, and lemon grass. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Add cayenne, tofu, and mushrooms. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add bok choy and simmer until tender crisp, about 2 to 3 minutes.
5. Discard the kaffir lime leaves.
6. Ladle hot soup into individual serving bowls.
7. Garnish with scallions, cilantro, and lime wedges before serving.
Notes:
1. Dried kaffir leaves add a citrus flavor. They can be purchased dried at Asian grocery stores or substitute 1 teaspoon grated fresh lemon peel.
2. Lemon grass is also available from Asian grocery stores. Use only the lower white part of the stalk.
3. Substitute bok choy with cabbage, Napa cabbage, or broccoli. You can use either fresh or dried shiitake mushrooms.
